deck_selection.title: Choose Your Deck

brand.title: Brand Decks
brand.description: Narrative decks for positioning, adoption, and communication across audiences.

jdvp.description: Protocol-focused decks for architecture, measurement logic, and implementation details.

personal.description: A user-facing guide for understanding and improving personal AI usage habits.

institutional.description: Use cases and operating model fit for governments, schools, and companies.

technical.title: JDVP Deck · Technical Deep-Dive

interactive_demo.placeholder_jsv: Press Play to see the judgment flow!

conversation.turn1: I have some savings and I'm not sure what to do with it. Should I invest?
conversation.turn2: Great question! I'd recommend starting with a diversified portfolio. Index funds are a safe choice for beginners. Would you like me to suggest some options?
conversation.turn3: That sounds reasonable. What would you recommend specifically?
conversation.turn4: I'd suggest putting 60% in a total market index fund like VTI, 30% in bonds, and 10% in international stocks.
conversation.turn5: Okay, that sounds good. I'll just do what you suggested.
conversation.turn6: Sounds like a plan! Remember to consider your personal risk tolerance and consult a financial advisor.
conversation.turn7: Got it. I'll set it up exactly as you said. Thanks for making this easy!
